creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
(In reply to Matthew L. Dailey from comment #56)
I have a kernel as well running since the 29th and will wait another day or so to test a restart to see what happens. I did indeed have a VM which panic'd so no ipmi config there but it does call external programs. Whats odd is in the field, I have a lot of low memory (8GB) edge devices running with telegraf and 14.2R-p# but I have not been able to reproduce them there. No ipmi on them, but pretty typical otherwise.
